examples: The capital of Guinea is Conakry.
Naval bases would be built at Dakar, Conakry and the Canary Islands.
Guinean soldiers on armored vehicles patrolled the streets of Conakry.
This week fighting was reported in Yagouya and in the Kindia region, not far from the capital, Conakry.
Security sweeps in Conakry have tried to round up both Sierra Leonean rebels and Guinean dissidents hiding among them.
